name: Deploy GitHub Pages green and verify vasudev.xyz online

description: Baseline local deploy readiness after resolving merge and removing Graphify graph

asi.hypothesis: A clean Hugo build with zero conflict markers and zero Graphify page/workflow references is ready to commit before pushing to GitHub Pages.
asi.local_checks: hugo --minify --gc passed, no unmerged files, no conflict markers, no blocked Graphify refs.

description: Attempted custom push command while autoresearch.sh gate was active

asi.hypothesis: Push and workflow monitoring can be treated as the deployment experiment, but the harness requires the command to be routed through autoresearch.sh when it exists.
asi.rollback_reason: No code change to keep. The run was rejected by the autoresearch harness before executing git push.
asi.next_action_hint: Update autoresearch.sh to support DEPLOY_REMOTE=1 mode, then run ./autoresearch.sh via run_experiment.

description: Remote deploy monitor selected a stale pre-fix workflow run

asi.hypothesis: Pushing current master then watching the latest deploy workflow should verify GitHub Pages, but the run selector must bind to the current HEAD SHA rather than any latest branch run.
asi.rollback_reason: The deployment check failed because it watched an older run that still contained the removed Graphify step, not because the current code failed.
asi.next_action_hint: Update autoresearch.sh to capture git rev-parse HEAD and select the Deploy to GitHub Pages run whose headSha matches it.

description: Watched current HEAD deploy workflow and verified live site HTTP 200

asi.hypothesis: Binding the workflow watcher to the current HEAD SHA avoids stale failed runs and correctly verifies the pushed deployment.

description: Pushed autoresearch watcher commit and verified deploy remained green

asi.hypothesis: Pushing the follow-up autoresearch watcher commit should not regress the Pages deploy or live site.
asi.live_site: https://vasudev.xyz/ returned HTTP 200 after the follow-up push.

description: Confirmed current HEAD deploy run and live site still green after compaction

asi.hypothesis: After resuming, the most valuable next check is binding the current local and remote HEAD to the already-triggered Pages run and confirming the live site remains online.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric equaled the existing best of zero deploy failures, so there was no code improvement to keep.
asi.next_action_hint: If continuing, extend the verification surface to include /blog/ and absence of /graph/ as diagnostic checks, but do not change production code unless a remote failure appears.
asi.workflow_run: 25226889617 is the Deploy to GitHub Pages run for current HEAD 4fd1ba1.

description: Extended verification to live blog and removed graph URL

asi.hypothesis: The next risk after home page HTTP 200 is that the blog route might not be online or the removed graph page might still be published from stale artifacts.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric stayed at the existing best of zero deploy failures. The temporary benchmark expansion confirmed diagnostics but did not improve the primary metric.
asi.next_action_hint: If continuing, persist the /blog/ and /graph/ diagnostics only if the user wants stronger ongoing monitoring. Production remains green without code changes.
asi.removed_graph: https://vasudev.xyz/graph/ returned HTTP 404, confirming the graph page is no longer live.

description: Watched newest in-progress Pages run for current HEAD to completion

asi.hypothesis: A newer Pages run existed for the same HEAD after resume, so watching that run provides stronger evidence than relying on the earlier successful run.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric equaled best at zero deploy failures, so no code change should be kept.
asi.next_action_hint: Monitor for additional workflow_run-triggered Pages reruns from translation automation. If no new HEAD run appears, final state remains stable.
asi.live_site: home and blog returned 200; graph returned 404.

description: Updated persisted autoresearch notes and reconfirmed stable deploy state

asi.hypothesis: Persisting the resume findings in autoresearch.md helps future agents avoid rechecking stale-run and graph-removal questions, while the current deploy state should remain green.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric stayed at zero deploy failures. Autoresearch files are preserved, but no production code improvement was needed.
asi.next_action_hint: No failing deployment signal remains. If forced to continue, poll GitHub Actions for a new current-HEAD Pages run, otherwise stop changing production code.

description: Polled current deployed HEAD and live routes after second resume

asi.hypothesis: After the second resume, the next most valuable non-invasive experiment is to poll the current HEAD deployment and live routes without changing production code.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric equaled the existing best of zero deploy failures, so there was no production improvement to keep.
asi.next_action_hint: All deployment signals are stable. Continue only by monitoring for a new current-HEAD Pages run or a live-route regression; avoid changing production code unless a failure appears.

description: Blog-card diagnostic hit non-fast-forward remote before deploy verification

asi.hypothesis: Adding a live blog content diagnostic would verify the blog is not just HTTP 200 but actually rendering post cards.
asi.rollback_reason: The run failed before verification because origin/master advanced, likely from automation, so local HEAD must be synchronized before further deploy checks.
asi.next_action_hint: Fetch origin/master, inspect the new commit, rebase or fast-forward local master without reintroducing Graphify, then rerun ./autoresearch.sh.
asi.error_detail: git push rejected with non-fast-forward: remote contains work not present locally.

description: Remote OG automation commit broke Hugo with duplicate images front matter

asi.hypothesis: After fast-forwarding to the automation commit, the deploy loop should verify the new remote HEAD, but local Hugo build catches regressions before pushing.
asi.rollback_reason: Hugo build failed because the OG image automation commit added duplicate images keys to blog front matter.
asi.next_action_hint: Deduplicate images keys in English blog front matter and inspect the OG image workflow so it does not append duplicate images on future runs.
asi.error_detail: content/blog/frontend-ai-agents-streaming-ui.md had duplicate images keys at front matter lines 6 and 7.

description: Uncommitted fix could not trigger a Pages run because autoresearch pushes only commits

asi.hypothesis: Deduplicating front matter and fixing the OG generator should restore deploy green, but the experiment harness must push a commit for GitHub Actions to run.
asi.rollback_reason: The run failed because fixes were uncommitted, so git push had no new HEAD and no matching Pages workflow appeared.
asi.next_action_hint: Reapply the dedupe and generator fix, then use a keep log on a local readiness experiment or manually commit? In this harness, create a passing local run that can be kept/committed before remote verification.
asi.error_detail: No Deploy to GitHub Pages workflow run found after push.

description: Fix OG generator duplicate images regression and restore local deploy readiness

asi.hypothesis: The root cause is insertImageField inserting after description before seeing an existing images field later, so scanning for images first and replacing only the first occurrence prevents future duplicates while deduplicating current posts restores Hugo.
asi.root_cause: OG automation commit fbf3036 added duplicate images fields because insertImageField inserted after description and then also replaced the existing images field that followed description.
asi.fix: Deduplicated current English blog front matter, changed insertImageField to pre-detect images and drop duplicates, and added a regression test for images after description.
asi.verification: hugo --minify --gc passed and cd cmd/generate-og-images && go test ./... passed in autoresearch.sh local candidate mode.
asi.next_action_hint: Run ./autoresearch.sh again after this keep commit so it can push the committed fix and watch the matching GitHub Pages run.

description: Pushed OG duplicate fix and verified Pages deploy plus live blog content

asi.hypothesis: Once the duplicate-image fix is committed, the deployment loop should push it, watch the matching current-HEAD Pages run, and verify live home/blog routes plus removed graph route.
asi.live_routes: home 200, blog 200 with 17 essay cards, graph 404.
asi.regression_guard: cmd/generate-og-images now has a test for existing images after description so the automation should not reintroduce duplicate images keys.

description: Pushed final autoresearch log commit and reconfirmed deploy green

asi.hypothesis: The keep commit created by the previous successful remote verification should itself deploy cleanly when pushed.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric equaled the existing best of zero deploy failures, and no production code changed in this experiment beyond pushing the existing commit.
asi.next_action_hint: Watch for automation follow-up commits. If origin/master advances again, fast-forward and rerun local Hugo plus generator tests before deploying.

description: Repolled latest pushed fix deployment and live content

asi.hypothesis: After pushing and verifying the duplicate-image fix, a subsequent poll should remain green while automation settles.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric remained at the best value of zero deploy failures, with no new code improvement to keep.
asi.next_action_hint: Check whether translate or OG automation created new master commits. If origin/master advances, fast-forward and rerun the loop to catch regressions.

description: Auto-merged OG PR advanced master without triggering Pages deploy

asi.hypothesis: Fast-forwarding to the bot OG image commit should have a matching Pages push run, but GitHub token automation can advance master without triggering the deploy workflow.
asi.rollback_reason: No matching Deploy to GitHub Pages run appeared for HEAD 5f4e105 within the wait window.
asi.next_action_hint: Teach autoresearch.sh to trigger deploy.yml via workflow_dispatch when no current-HEAD Pages run exists after a push/no-op push, then watch that run.
asi.error_detail: gh run list showed no Deploy to GitHub Pages run for 5f4e105; latest deploy remained bc926a6.

description: Dispatch Pages deploy when automation advances master without push run

asi.hypothesis: When bot automation advances master without triggering a push deploy, explicitly dispatching deploy.yml on master should produce a current-HEAD Pages run and publish the latest content.
asi.live_routes: home 200, blog 200 with 17 cards, graph 404 after dispatch.
asi.fix: autoresearch.sh now falls back to gh workflow run deploy.yml --ref master if no current-HEAD deploy run appears.

description: Attempted focused i18n verification while autoresearch.sh gate was active

asi.hypothesis: A focused go test plus Hugo build command can validate the guide translation CI change.
asi.rollback_reason: The autoresearch harness rejected custom experiment commands because autoresearch.sh exists.
asi.next_action_hint: Run ./autoresearch.sh, then run focused checks with bash if needed outside autoresearch.

description: Extend translation CI to include recursive guides and translated guide section indexes

asi.hypothesis: The /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ 404s happen because the translation workflow only scans flat blog files and skips section _index.md pages. Recursing content/guides with _index translation lets CI generate localized guide landing pages and nested guide pages.
asi.root_cause: Translate workflow was scoped to content/blog/*.md and cmd/translate only read one directory level while skipping all _index.md files, so no content/guides/_index.de.md or _index.es.md could be generated.
asi.verification: Added failing collector tests first, then implemented recursive source discovery with an --include-index flag. Verified cd cmd/translate && go test ./... and hugo --quiet. autoresearch.sh passed with deploy_failures=0.

description: Pushed i18n CI change and verified GitHub Pages deploy stayed green

asi.hypothesis: After committing the recursive guide translation workflow update, the normal deploy should remain green and the live site should continue serving existing pages while translation CI generates guide locales separately.
asi.verification: autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25234333973, and verified live https://vasudev.xyz/ and /blog/ returned 200 while removed /graph/ stayed 404.
asi.note: The translation workflow now runs for content/guides and will open/merge a bot PR with content/guides/_index.de.md and _index.es.md, which should make /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ render after that translation PR deploys.

description: Limit guide translation CI to section index pages so locale landing pages unblock quickly

asi.hypothesis: The first guide translation run is slow because it attempts every guide page. Translating only guide _index.md files fixes /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ quickly while keeping blog translation unchanged.
asi.root_cause: The requested 404s require localized section indexes, not every nested guide chapter. Full recursive guide translation can spend too long in LLM calls before producing the landing pages.
asi.verification: Added an index-only collector test first, then implemented --index-only and verified go test ./... in cmd/translate plus hugo --quiet. autoresearch.sh passed locally with candidate_dirty=1 before commit.

description: Run guide index translations before slower blog translations

asi.hypothesis: The current translation workflow spends too long in blog translation before it reaches guide indexes, so running guide index translation first lets CI create /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ content before any slower blog work.
asi.evidence: GitHub Actions run 25235376413 remained in the Translate content step for over 10 minutes. The guide 404 fix only needs section index translations.
asi.verification: cd cmd/translate && go test ./... passed, hugo --quiet passed, and autoresearch.sh passed locally with deploy_failures=0.

description: Pushed guide-first translation workflow and verified deploy

asi.hypothesis: Pushing the guide-first translation workflow should keep GitHub Pages green and cancel older in-progress translation runs through the workflow concurrency group.
asi.verification: autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25235751514, and verified live root and blog returned 200.
asi.next_action: Watch the new Translate content run for HEAD 8afafb6, then verify generated guide locale pages or inspect the bot PR if auto-merge is pending.

description: Trigger translation workflow when its own CI definition changes

asi.hypothesis: Changes to translate.yml should start the translation workflow so CI behavior changes can be validated immediately after push.
asi.root_cause: The previous guide-first workflow commit did not start a new Translate content run because on.push.paths omitted .github/workflows/translate.yml.
asi.verification: go test ./... in cmd/translate passed, hugo --quiet passed, and autoresearch.sh passed locally.

description: Pushed translation workflow self-trigger and verified deploy

asi.hypothesis: After adding the workflow self-trigger path, pushing master should start Translate content and keep the normal Pages deploy green.
asi.verification: autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25235800353, and verified live root/blog returned 200.
asi.next_action: Watch the Translate content workflow for the pushed commit, confirm it creates or merges guide index translations, then verify /de/guides/ and /es/guides/.

description: Bound translation HTTP timeout and retry attempts in CI

asi.hypothesis: The translation workflow is hanging in LLM HTTP calls. Configurable HTTP timeout and retry attempts let CI fail over or skip files instead of spending many minutes per field.
asi.evidence: Translate content run 25235800348 stayed in the Translate content step for over 10 minutes even after guide-index-only ordering.
asi.verification: Added tests for TRANSLATE_MAX_ATTEMPTS and TRANSLATE_HTTP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, then verified go test ./... in cmd/translate, hugo --quiet, and autoresearch.sh locally.

description: Pushed bounded translation CI and verified deploy

asi.hypothesis: Pushing the bounded translation retry/timeout change will cancel the stuck translate run and start a faster bounded run while Pages remains green.
asi.verification: autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25236160115, and verified root/blog live 200.
asi.next_action: Watch Translate content for commit 876a48e, then verify guide locale pages once the bot PR merges.

description: Add dedicated CI workflow for guide index translations

asi.hypothesis: A dedicated guide-index translation workflow will generate content/guides/_index.de.md and _index.es.md without being blocked by slower blog translation runs.
asi.evidence: The combined Translate content workflow still stayed in its translation step for more than 10 minutes after adding bounded attempts. A small independent workflow isolates the exact files needed to fix /de/guides/ and /es/guides/.
asi.verification: go test ./... in cmd/translate passed, hugo --quiet passed, and autoresearch.sh passed locally.

description: Pushed dedicated guide translation workflow and verified deploy

asi.hypothesis: Pushing the dedicated guide index translation workflow should start a separate Guide workflow and keep Pages deploy green.
asi.verification: autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25236500958, and verified root/blog live 200.
asi.next_action: Watch or dispatch Translate guide indexes, then verify generated /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ after bot merge and deploy.

description: Use direct squash merge for translation bot PRs

asi.hypothesis: Translation workflows should directly squash-merge their bot PRs because repository auto-merge is not enabled for unprotected branches.
asi.root_cause: Translate guide indexes created PR #163 with the expected guide files, but gh pr merge --auto failed with 'Protected branch rules not configured for this branch'.
asi.verification: Manually merged PR #163, then verified go test ./... in cmd/translate, hugo --quiet, and local public/de/guides/index.html plus public/es/guides/index.html exist. autoresearch.sh passed locally.

description: Pushed direct-merge translation workflow fix and verified deploy

asi.hypothesis: After merging guide translations and fixing bot PR merge mode, pushing master should deploy localized guide pages successfully.
asi.verification: autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25236606972, and verified root/blog live 200.
asi.next_action: Wait for Pages propagation from the translation merge and direct-merge workflow fix, then curl /de/guides/ and /es/guides/.

description: Make guide index translation front-matter only to avoid empty locale guide list

asi.hypothesis: The localized guide landing pages are empty because only content/guides/_index.de.md and _index.es.md exist. The child section content/guides/modern-cpp-recovery/_index.de.md and _index.es.md failed to generate because body chunk translation timed out. For the guide list, translating front matter only is sufficient to create the child section card and avoid expensive body chunk calls.
asi.root_cause: Translate guide indexes logs show the nested _index.md attempted six body chunks, then timed out and skipped the file. Hugo localized section lists only include localized child sections, so /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ had no .Pages to render.
asi.verification: Added --front-matter-only mode and configured translate-guides.yml to use it. Verified cd cmd/translate && go test ./... plus hugo --quiet and autoresearch.sh locally.

description: Push rejected because remote received guide translation bot commits

asi.hypothesis: The front-matter-only guide translation change can be pushed and verified normally.
asi.rollback_reason: Push was rejected because origin/master advanced, likely from the guide translation workflow bot merge. The code change itself had passed local checks before commit.
asi.next_action_hint: Fetch and rebase onto origin/master, reapply the front-matter-only change if autoresearch reverted it, then rerun local checks and deploy verification.

description: Rebased guide empty-list fix onto generated nested translations and verified deploy

asi.hypothesis: After rebasing onto the bot-generated nested guide translations, the localized guide landing pages should render cards locally and deploy cleanly.
asi.verification: hugo --quiet generated public/de/guides/index.html and public/es/guides/index.html with one essay-card each. autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25244955472, and verified root/blog live 200.
asi.root_cause: The earlier /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ pages were not 404 anymore, but empty because only the top-level localized guides section existed. The nested modern-cpp-recovery localized section was missing after CI timed out translating its body chunks.

description: Render localized guide content and fallback topic cards when child translations are missing

asi.hypothesis: Localized guide pages show 0 topics because localized guide sections have fewer or no localized child pages. The templates should render section content and fall back to the default-language child pages for counts and topic cards until per-topic translations exist.
asi.root_cause: Top-level localized guide card used len .RegularPages on the localized child section, which is zero when localized chapter pages are missing. Nested guide sections with type guide were using layouts/_default/list.html, which did not render guide section content and did not fallback to English topic pages.
asi.verification: hugo --quiet generated /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ with 20 topics, and generated /de/guides/modern-cpp-recovery/ plus /es/guides/modern-cpp-recovery/ with essay-card topic lists. go test ./... in cmd/translate passed. autoresearch.sh passed locally.

description: Pushed localized guide topic fallback and verified deploy

asi.hypothesis: Pushing the guide template fallback should make localized guide pages show topic counts and topic cards after deploy.
asi.verification: autoresearch.sh pushed master, watched Deploy to GitHub Pages run 25245890701, and verified root/blog live 200. Local Hugo output showed /de/guides/ and /es/guides/ with 20 topics and nested guide pages with essay cards.
asi.next_action: Curl localized guide pages after Pages propagation to confirm live HTML includes 20 topics and topic cards.
